```{r rvs-stats}
    cat("  After:  ", round(rvs_after[i], 4), " ng/μL\n")
    if(rvs_after[i] == 0) {
      cat("  Reduction: Complete (ND)\n")
    } else {
      cat("  Fold:    ", round(rvs_before[i] / rvs_after[i], 2), "×\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
  cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
  if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    cat("*** HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.001)\n")
  } else if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    cat("** VERY SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.01)\n")
  } else if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("* SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.05)\n")
  } else if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.10) {
    cat("† Trend toward significance (p < 0.10)\n")
  } else {
    cat("Not significant at α=0.05\n")
  }
  
  if(n_nondetect == n_pairs_rvs) {
    cat("\n✓ COMPLETE DEPLETION achieved in all samples!\n")
  } else if(n_nondetect > 0) {
    cat("\n✓ Complete depletion in", n_nondetect, "out of", n_pairs_rvs, "samples\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
  
} else if(n_pairs_rvs == 1) {
  cat("⚠ Only 1 complete pair - insufficient for statistical testing\n")
  
  rvs_before <- complete_pairs_rvs$`Mean_Conc_Zero_Before Depletion`
  rvs_after <- complete_pairs_rvs$`Mean_Conc_Zero_After Depletion`
  
  cat("Before:", round(rvs_before, 2), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("After:  ", round(rvs_after, 4), "ng/μL\n")
  
  if(rvs_after == 0) {
    cat("Reduction: Complete depletion (ND)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("Fold reduction:", round(rvs_before / rvs_after, 2), "×\n\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("⚠ No complete pairs available for RVS samples\n\n")
}
```

## 7.3 CAT Samples - Statistical Analysis

```{r cat-stats}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("CAT SAMPLES ANALYSIS\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Filter CAT data and use 0 for non-detects
cat_data <- enriched_data %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "CAT") %>%
  select(Replicate_ID, Treatment, Mean_Conc, Mean_Conc_Zero, Mean_Ct, Mean_Ct_Max, All_Non_Detect)

cat("CAT sample composition:\n")
print(cat_data)
cat("\n")

# Reshape to wide format
cat_wide <- cat_data %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = Replicate_ID,
    names_from = Treatment, 
    values_from = c(Mean_Conc_Zero, Mean_Ct_Max, All_Non_Detect)
  )

cat("CAT paired data (ND = 0):\n")
print(cat_wide)
cat("\n")

# Check if we have complete pairs
complete_pairs_cat <- cat_wide %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Mean_Conc_Zero_Before Depletion`) & 
         !is.na(`Mean_Conc_Zero_After Depletion`))

n_pairs_cat <- nrow(complete_pairs_cat)

if(n_pairs_cat >= 2) {
  
  # Extract vectors
  cat_before <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Conc_Zero_Before Depletion`
  cat_after <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Conc_Zero_After Depletion`
  cat_ct_before <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Ct_Max_Before Depletion`
  cat_ct_after <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Ct_Max_After Depletion`
  
  cat("CAT paired values:\n")
  cat("Before:", cat_before, "ng/μL\n")
  cat("After: ", cat_after, "ng/μL\n\n")
  
  # Check how many are non-detects
  n_nondetect <- sum(complete_pairs_cat$`All_Non_Detect_After Depletion`, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("Number of non-detects after depletion:", n_nondetect, "out of", n_pairs_cat, "\n\n")
  
  # Statistical test
  if(all(cat_after == 0)) {
    cat("⚠ ALL 'After' samples are non-detects (0 ng/μL)\n")
    cat("Cannot perform standard paired t-test (all after values = 0)\n")
    cat("This represents COMPLETE depletion!\n\n")
    
    # Use Wilcoxon signed-rank test
    cat_wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(cat_before, cat_after, 
                                      paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
    
    cat("WILCOXON SIGNED-RANK TEST:\n")
    cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
    cat("V-statistic:      ", cat_wilcox_result$statistic, "\n")
    cat("p-value:         ", format.pval(cat_wilcox_result$p.value, digits = 5), "\n\n")
    
    cat_test_result <- cat_wilcox_result
    cat_test_type <- "Wilcoxon signed-rank"
    
  } else {
    # Paired t-test
    cat_paired_result <- t.test(cat_before, cat_after, 
                                 paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
    
    cat("PAIRED T-TEST RESULTS:\n")
    cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
    cat("t-statistic:      ", round(cat_paired_result$statistic, 4), "\n")
    cat("df:              ", cat_paired_result$parameter, "\n")
    cat("p-value:         ", format.pval(cat_paired_result$p.value, digits = 5), "\n\n")
    
    cat_test_result <- cat_paired_result
    cat_test_type <- "Paired t-test"
  }
  
  # Calculate statistics
  cat_mean_before <- mean(cat_before)
  cat_mean_after <- mean(cat_after)
  cat_sd_before <- sd(cat_before)
  cat_sd_after <- sd(cat_after)
  
  cat_differences <- cat_before - cat_after
  cat_mean_diff <- mean(cat_differences)
  cat_sd_diff <- sd(cat_differences)
  
  # Handle division by zero for fold change
  if(cat_mean_after == 0) {
    cat_fold_change <- Inf
    cat_fold_change_display <- "> 10,000"
    cat_percent_reduction <- 100
  } else {
    cat_fold_change <- cat_mean_before / cat_mean_after
    cat_fold_change_display <- round(cat_fold_change, 2)
    cat_percent_reduction <- (cat_mean_diff / cat_mean_before) * 100
  }
  
  # Cohen's d
  if(cat_sd_diff > 0) {
    cat_cohens_d <- cat_mean_diff / cat_sd_diff
  } else {
    cat_cohens_d <- NA
  }
  
  # Delta Ct
  cat_delta_ct <- mean(cat_ct_after - cat_ct_before)
  
  cat("DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS:\n")
  cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat("Before:  ", round(cat_mean_before, 2), " ± ", round(cat_sd_before, 2), " ng/μL\n")
  cat("After:  ", round(cat_mean_after, 4), " ± ", round(cat_sd_after, 4), " ng/μL\n\n")
  
  cat("EFFECT SIZE:\n")
  cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat("Fold reduction:    ", cat_fold_change_display, "×\n")
  cat("Percent reduction: ", round(cat_percent_reduction, 2), "%\n")
  cat("ΔCt:               ", round(cat_delta_ct, 2), "\n")
  if(!is.na(cat_cohens_d)) {
    cat("Cohen's d:         ", round(cat_cohens_d, 2), " (", 
        ifelse(abs(cat_cohens_d) > 1.2, "Very Large",
        ifelse(abs(cat_cohens_d) > 0.8, "Large",
        ifelse(abs(cat_cohens_d) > 0.5, "Medium", "Small"))), ")\n")
  } else {
    cat("Cohen's d:         N/A (SD = 0)\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
  
  # Individual sample effects
  cat("INDIVIDUAL SAMPLE EFFECTS:\n")
  cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
  for(i in 1:n_pairs_cat) {
    cat("Sample", complete_pairs_cat$Replicate_ID[i], ":\n")
    cat("  Before: ", round(cat_before[i], 2), " ng/μL\n")
    cat("  After:  ", round(cat_after[i], 4), " ng/μL\n")
    if(cat_after[i] == 0) {
      cat("  Reduction: Complete (ND)\n")
    } else {
      cat("  Fold:   ", round(cat_before[i] / cat_after[i], 2), "×\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
  cat("───────────────────────────────────────\n")
  if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.001) {
    cat("*** HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.001)\n")
  } else if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.01) {
    cat("** VERY SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.01)\n")
  } else if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("* SIGNIFICANT reduction (p < 0.05)\n")
  } else if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.10) {
    cat("† Trend toward significance (p < 0.10)\n")
  } else {
    cat("Not significant at α=0.05\n")
  }
  
  if(n_nondetect == n_pairs_cat) {
    cat("\n✓ COMPLETE DEPLETION achieved in all samples!\n")
  } else if(n_nondetect > 0) {
    cat("\n✓ Complete depletion in", n_nondetect, "out of", n_pairs_cat, "samples\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
  
} else if(n_pairs_cat == 1) {
  cat("⚠ Only 1 complete pair - insufficient for statistical testing\n")
  
  cat_before <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Conc_Zero_Before Depletion`
  cat_after <- complete_pairs_cat$`Mean_Conc_Zero_After Depletion`
  
  cat("Before:", round(cat_before, 2), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("After: ", round(cat_after, 4), "ng/μL\n")
  
  if(cat_after == 0) {
    cat("Reduction: Complete depletion (ND)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("Fold reduction:", round(cat_before / cat_after, 2), "×\n\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("⚠ No complete pairs available for CAT samples\n\n")
}
```

## 7.4 Enriched Samples Summary Table

```{r enriched-summary-table}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("ENRICHED SAMPLES SUMMARY\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Create summary table
enriched_results <- data.frame(
  Sample_Type = character(),
  N_Pairs = numeric(),
  Test_Type = character(),
  Mean_Before = numeric(),
  Mean_After = numeric(),
  Fold_Reduction = character(),
  Percent_Reduction = numeric(),
  Delta_Ct = numeric(),
  P_Value = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add RVS if analyzed
if(exists("n_pairs_rvs") && n_pairs_rvs >= 2) {
  enriched_results <- rbind(enriched_results, data.frame(
    Sample_Type = "RVS",
    N_Pairs = n_pairs_rvs,
    Test_Type = rvs_test_type,
    Mean_Before = round(rvs_mean_before, 2),
    Mean_After = round(rvs_mean_after, 4),
    Fold_Reduction = as.character(rvs_fold_change_display),
    Percent_Reduction = round(rvs_percent_reduction, 2),
    Delta_Ct = round(rvs_delta_ct, 2),
    P_Value = format.pval(rvs_test_result$p.value, digits = 4)
  ))
}

# Add CAT if analyzed
if(exists("n_pairs_cat") && n_pairs_cat >= 2) {
  enriched_results <- rbind(enriched_results, data.frame(
    Sample_Type = "CAT",
    N_Pairs = n_pairs_cat,
    Test_Type = cat_test_type,
    Mean_Before = round(cat_mean_before, 2),
    Mean_After = round(cat_mean_after, 4),
    Fold_Reduction = as.character(cat_fold_change_display),
    Percent_Reduction = round(cat_percent_reduction, 2),
    Delta_Ct = round(cat_delta_ct, 2),
    P_Value = format.pval(cat_test_result$p.value, digits = 4)
  ))
}

if(nrow(enriched_results) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(enriched_results,
               col.names = c("Sample Type", "N", "Test", "Before (ng/μL)", 
                            "After (ng/μL)", "Fold↓", "%↓", "ΔCt", "p-value"),
               caption = "Enriched Samples:   Host-DNA Depletion Statistical Summary")
} else {
  cat("No statistical tests could be performed (insufficient sample pairs)\n")
}

cat("\n")
cat("Note: Non-detects treated as 0 ng/μL\n")
cat("Fold reduction displayed as '>10,000×' when mean after = 0\n\n")
```

## 7.5 Visualize Enriched Sample Results

```{r plot-enriched-results, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Prepare data for plotting (using 0 for non-detects)
enriched_plot_data <- enriched_data %>%
  filter(! is.na(Mean_Conc_Zero)) %>%
  mutate(
    Display_Conc = ifelse(Mean_Conc_Zero == 0, 0.0001, Mean_Conc_Zero),  # For log scale
    Is_NonDetect = (Mean_Conc_Zero == 0)
  )

# Calculate means for bars
enriched_means <- enriched_plot_data %>%
  group_by(Sample_Type, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(Display_Conc, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = sd(Display_Conc, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    Any_NonDetect = any(Is_NonDetect),
    All_NonDetect = all(Is_NonDetect),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Create plot
plot_enriched_summary <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = enriched_means,
           aes(x = Sample_Type, y = Mean, fill = Treatment),
           position = position_dodge(0.8), alpha = 0.7, width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(data = enriched_means %>% filter(! All_NonDetect),
                aes(x = Sample_Type, y = Mean, 
                    ymin = pmax(Mean - SE, 0.0001), ymax = Mean + SE,
                    group = Treatment),
                position = position_dodge(0.8), width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(data = enriched_plot_data,
             aes(x = Sample_Type, y = Display_Conc, 
                 color = Treatment, group = interaction(Sample_Type, Treatment)),
             position = position_dodge(0.8), size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  # Add "ND" label for all non-detects
  geom_text(data = enriched_means %>% filter(All_NonDetect),
            aes(x = Sample_Type, y = Mean * 5, label = "All ND", group = Treatment),
            position = position_dodge(0.8), 
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", color = "#4DBBD5") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Before Depletion" = "#E64B35", 
                               "After Depletion" = "#4DBBD5")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Before Depletion" = "#E64B35", 
                                "After Depletion" = "#4DBBD5")) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10",
                     labels = scales::trans_format("log10", scales:: math_format(10^.x))) +
  labs(
    title = "Enriched Samples:   Host-DNA Depletion Efficacy",
    subtitle = "RVS and CAT samples (log scale); ND = 0 ng/μL (complete depletion)",
    x = "Sample Type",
    y = "Chicken DNA Concentration (ng/μL, log scale)",
    fill = "Treatment",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "gray30"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(plot_enriched_summary)
ggsave("enriched_samples_summary.png", plot_enriched_summary, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## 7.6 Manuscript Text for Enriched Samples

```{r enriched-manuscript-text}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("SUGGESTED MANUSCRIPT TEXT\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

cat("For RVS and CAT Enriched Samples:\n\n")

if(exists("rvs_test_result") && exists("cat_test_result")) {
  # Both samples analyzed
  cat('"In enriched samples, host-DNA depletion achieved complete or near-complete\n')
  cat('removal of chicken DNA.  RVS samples showed a ', rvs_fold_change_display, '-fold reduction\n', sep='')
  cat('(', round(rvs_percent_reduction, 1), '% reduction, ', rvs_test_type, ':  p ', sep='')
  if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.001) cat('< 0.001') else cat('= ', format.pval(rvs_test_result$p.value, digits = 3), sep='')
  cat('). CAT samples showed a ', cat_fold_change_display, '-fold reduction\n', sep='')
  cat('(', round(cat_percent_reduction, 1), '% reduction, ', cat_test_type, ': p ', sep='')
  if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.001) cat('< 0.001') else cat('= ', format.pval(cat_test_result$p.value, digits = 3), sep='')
  cat('). In both sample types, all post-depletion samples were below or at the\n')
  cat('detection limit, demonstrating highly effective host-DNA removal.  "\n\n')
  
} else if(exists("rvs_test_result")) {
  # Only RVS analyzed
  cat('"In RVS enriched samples, host-DNA depletion achieved a ', rvs_fold_change_display, '-fold\n', sep='')
  cat('reduction (', round(rvs_percent_reduction, 1), '% reduction, ', rvs_test_type, ':  p ', sep='')
  if(rvs_test_result$p.value < 0.001) cat('< 0.001') else cat('= ', format.pval(rvs_test_result$p.value, digits = 3), sep='')
  cat('), with all post-depletion samples at or below the detection limit.  "\n\n')
  
} else if(exists("cat_test_result")) {
  # Only CAT analyzed
  cat('"In CAT enriched samples, host-DNA depletion achieved a ', cat_fold_change_display, '-fold\n', sep='')
  cat('reduction (', round(cat_percent_reduction, 1), '% reduction, ', cat_test_type, ':  p ', sep='')
  if(cat_test_result$p.value < 0.001) cat('< 0.001') else cat('= ', format.pval(cat_test_result$p.value, digits = 3), sep='')
  cat('), with all post-depletion samples at or below the detection limit. "\n\n')
  
} else {
  cat('"Insufficient paired samples for statistical analysis of enriched samples.  "\n\n')
}
```
